title: EPI Graduate Apprentice Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
shortInfo: Engineering Projects India (EPI) (EPI) Graduate Apprentice (Civil) Notification 2026 has been released on 02 May 2026 on the official website https://www.epi.gov.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the EPI Graduate Apprentice Recruitment 2026. Candidates aged between 18 to 30 years who have a BE/B.Tech (Civil) degree with minimum 55% marks are eligible to apply for this Graduate Apprentice post. The online/email application process for EPI Graduate Apprentice Recruitment 2026 has started on 02 May 2026 and will remain open until 05 June 2026. Candidates can download the officia

basic_details.job_title: EPI Graduate Apprentice Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Engineering Projects India (EPI) (EPI) Graduate Apprentice (Civil) Notification 2026 has been released on 02 May 2026 on the official website https://www.epi.gov.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the EPI Graduate Apprentice Recruitment 2026. Candidates aged between 18 to 30 years who have a BE/B.Tech (Civil) degree with minimum 55% marks are eligible to apply for this Graduate Apprentice post. The online/email application process for EPI Graduate Apprentice Recruitment 2026 has started on 02 May 2026 and will remain open until 05 June 2026. Candidates can download the officia

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 30 years Age Relaxation: 05 years for SC/ST & 03 years for OBC (Non-Creamy Layer)

qualification.details: Graduate Apprentice (Civil): BE/B.Tech (Civil) with not less than 55% marks from a reputed Institute/University approved by AICTE. Candidates should not have completed three years after passing out of the qualifying examination as on 05 June 2026. Candidates awaiting results of the minimum qualification prescribed need not apply. Candidates who have undergone apprentice training in any other organization need not apply.

salary_details.details: Graduate Apprentice: Rs. 10,000/- per month. No output bonus or other incentive or any perks and allowances.

selection_process: Shortlisted on the basis of merit list formed on the basis of marks secured in Minimum required Educational Qualification.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for EPI Graduate Apprentice Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 05-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the EPI Graduate Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 05 June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated email address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Graduate Apprentice post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a BE/B.Tech degree in Civil Engineering with at least 55% marks from an AICTE-approved institution.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Graduate Apprentice position?
faq.answer: The minimum age is 18 years and the maximum age is 30 years. Age relaxations are applicable for SC/ST and OBC candidates.

faq.question: Q4. How will candidates be selected for the Graduate Apprentice role?
faq.answer: Selection will be based on a merit list prepared from the marks obtained in the minimum required educational qualification.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Graduate Apprentice post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a stipend of Rs. 10,000/- per month. No additional perks or allowances will be provided.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for any category of candidates.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted via email to the specified email address. No other mode of application will be accepted.

faq.question: Q8. What documents need to be attached with the application?
faq.answer: You need to attach self-attested copies of all testimonials and certificates, including educational qualifications and identity proof.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates awaiting their final results apply?
faq.answer: No, candidates who are awaiting their minimum qualification results are not eligible to apply for this position.

faq.question: Q10. What is the duration of the apprenticeship?
faq.answer: The job type is contract, and candidates should not have completed three years after passing out of the qualifying examination as of the last date of application.
